title: generate-resume MCP Tool Contract
description: Generates a formatted resume in DOCX, PDF, or HTML format from markdown content

tool.name: generate-resume
tool.description: Generates a professionally formatted resume in the specified format (DOCX, PDF, or HTML) using the provided template and markdown content.

format.description: Output format for the generated resume

content.description: Base64-encoded file content (for docx/pdf) or HTML string

resumeName.description: Resume owner's name extracted from content

input.content:

## Work Experience

- Built features

## Education

### BS CS - MIT

## Skills

**Languages**: Python

testScenarios.description: Should generate valid DOCX file from valid markdown

input.content:
# Test Person

**Email**: test@example.com | **Phone**: +19999999999 | **Location**: San Francisco, CA
**LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/testperson

## Professional Summary

Experienced engineer with 10 years

## Work Experience

### Senior Engineer at CompanyX
**San Francisco, CA** | **06/2020 - Present**

- Led architecture design
- Mentored 10 engineers
- Increased performance by 50%

## Education

### MS Computer Science - Stanford University
**Stanford, CA** | **Graduated: 06/2015**
GPA: 3.9

## Skills

**Languages**: Python, Java, JavaScript, Go
**Frameworks**: Django, Spring Boot, React
**Tools**: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS

assertions: generated document should contain 'San Francisco, CA'
generated document should contain 'Experienced engineer with 10 years'
generated document should contain 'Senior Engineer at CompanyX'
generated document should contain 'MS Computer Science - Stanford University'
generated document should contain 'Python, Java, JavaScript, Go'
